anti_claim: This standard governs public-safe macro-to-Microcosm projection, including classified public-safe bodies with provenance. It does not authorize true private body export, release, publication, recipient work, provider calls, private-root equivalence, or live macro source authority.

anti_claim_contract.rule: projection import material must state what it does not authorize

anti_claims: This public standard does not make macro private source bodies public.
This public standard does not claim Microcosm is equivalent to the private root.

omission_receipt.reason: public projection carries source refs, verified public body targets, public runtime refs, authority ceilings, validation refs, and secret-exclusion receipts

omission_receipt_contract.rule: every omitted private material class must carry an omission receipt ref

allowed_public_inputs: public-safe macro pattern bodies with provenance
public-safe macro tool bodies with provenance
public-safe macro receipt bodies with provenance
public-safe macro proof bodies with provenance

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source refs, verified body targets, public runtime refs, validation refs, secret-exclusion coverage, negative-case coverage, and anti-claim

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs must carry provenance; public-safe body imports must be classified and claim-bounded; public replacement refs must be public-root relative

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Ad hoc copying of unclassified macro bodies or authority claims into public Microcosm.
failure_modes: private body copied into public fixture
projection upgrades itself into source authority
landed projection cell still appears as open work
projection claims release or private equivalence
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe import membrane that turns macro substrate into classified public-safe bodies, metadata, fixture shape, standards, receipts, and explicit omission records.
standard_payload.teleology: Make future Microcosm cells cheaper and safer by standardizing how macro intelligence enters the public root.

cell_status_protocol.purpose: Make the intake board self-describing so ready, landed, bridged, and consumed public replacements do not require raw receipt interpretation.

validation_rules: require at least two macro source refs, public replacement refs, and validation refs
allow classified public-safe macro proof/tool/pattern/receipt body imports with provenance and bounded claims
reject true private body import requests
require omission receipts for omitted private material classes
reject live macro source authority upgrades
reject release, publication, recipient-work, and private-equivalence overclaims
score every proposed cell for source refs, target refs, validation refs, copy policy, and body-copy blockers before import
emit projection_status, cell_state, action_required, status_reason, landed_evidence_refs, and status counts for every proposed cell
count landed or bridged cells separately from open actionable cells
require private-state scan and redacted receipts
